title: Rebuild of Eva re released on Blu Ray and DVD as 111
display_title: Rebuild of Eva re released on Blu Ray and DVD as 111
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild of Eva re-released on Blu-Ray & DVD as 1.11             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 19, 2009 5:57 pm Gendo'sPapa gave the link for wrote: [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2009-02-19/anno-evangelion-2.0-film-slated-for-june-27-in-japan[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Feb 19, 2009 6:13 pm my hopes exactly SSD Im assuming they would if they liscensed REBUILD in its entirty

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Feb 19, 2009 6:41 pm No worries. But the thing that's gonna bug me is this won't be the last re-edit of this film we'll get I'm sure. I figure the changes they'll make is brighten the image quality and add in a quick cryptic insert here and there that will overall better tie the four films together. Cause right now I'm 100% sure Eva 2.0 went through some sort of drastic rewrite and evolution that Anno did not originally intend. I remember one of those Pachinko shorts had a fully Rebuild animated explosion shot of Shamshel where she fell onto and enveloped Eva 01 before going ker-blooey. So I bet that might sneak in. Downside is expect another one of these to Film 1 come the release of Part 3 and so on and so forth. Unless if the Japanese DVD/Blu-Ray has outstanding extras and the film goes through some drastic changes this cut will probably be torrented by myself. And not spend another $70+ to buy it imported. It'd be nice if Funimation got these new versions. Probably will bring them out in a REBUILD OF EVANGELION BOXSET when the series is completed.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 19, 2009 6:51 pm Seeing as I forgot to post this link earlier: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/02/rebuild-101-re-released-on-dvd-and-blue-ray-disc-as-rebuld-111/ Also, I'm hoping their will be some ultimate boxset release in the states of all the revisions of the 4 Rebuild films....only to be overshadowed by a re-release and mastering by Gainax/Khara a month later, then ANOTHER release a year later, then a decade later will be the....

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu Feb 19, 2009 7:57 pm Cool, added material, high deff. What's not to like.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Feb 19, 2009 8:22 pm Pre-ordering the BD from amazon.co.jp as soon as it's up there and I will be masturbating furiously when it gets here.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Feb 19, 2009 8:24 pm If there any new cuts, providing some screen caps would be awesome. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 19, 2009 10:46 pm I guess this'll be my excuse to finally replace my computer's old DVD drive (which is so crappy I have to use a straightened paper clip to make it eject) with a Blu-Ray/DVD drive. And damn those Khairax bastards. What exactly are they going to be "remastering" here? It's a digital film, for crissake. "Remastering" is just a fancy way of saying "giving them what they should've gotten the first time around", amirite?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Feb 20, 2009 12:09 am Reichu wrote: And damn those Khairax bastards. What exactly are they going to be "remastering" here? It's a digital film, for crissake. "Remastering" is just a fancy way of saying "giving them what they should've gotten the first time around", amirite?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Feb 20, 2009 12:29 am Reichu wrote: I guess this'll be my excuse to finally replace my computer's old DVD drive (which is so crappy I have to use a straightened paper clip to make it eject) with a Blu-Ray/DVD drive.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Fri Feb 20, 2009 12:40 am *shakes head*

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Feb 20, 2009 3:01 am Watch the only change they make to this release is they reshape and update the teaser for 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 20, 2009 3:09 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: reshape and update the teaser for 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Feb 20, 2009 2:41 pm PREDICTION/THEORY: FUNimation Entertainment Licensed 1.11. They put it online as 1.01 so as not to let the cat out of the bag before Japan announced that they were releasing 1.11.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Feb 20, 2009 3:11 pm I'm really really really hoping you're right, Cat42.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Feb 20, 2009 3:34 pm FUNimation Entertainment seems to me like a company who wants to keep anime fans happy. Shikabane Hime, for example, is available online, for free, legally a couple weeks after it airs in Japan. Hell Girl came with art cards, and extras like actor interviews and such with each DVD. They release half season box sets for fairly cheap, and full season box sets later on even cheaper. They released DBZ widescreen in America before it was even released that way in Japan! They always go for digital distribution rights along with DVD and Blu-ray rights now. I'll admit, I was a bit let down with their xxxHOLiC DVD release and it's lack of extras, however, Kodansha by my understanding has been getting harder to negotiate with. They got a crapload of extras for Tenchi Muyo Ryo-ohki 3. They rescued so many Geneon titles that were in flux. Hell, when I had issues with 2 of my DVDs released by them, they replaced them even though I had lost the receipts. Believe in FUNimation! I believe in Eva 1.0's licenser!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Feb 20, 2009 3:58 pm I feel much better now! Okay, that's enough of that.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Feb 20, 2009 4:38 pm cat42 wrote: They released DBZ widescreen in America before it was even released that way in Japan!

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Feb 20, 2009 4:59 pm I hate to be nitpicky but the front page says this comes out May 17 when it actually comes out May 27. Anywho, I hope Funimation gets it right. I'm not sure if I'm missing out on any extras but I'm glad they rushed GURREN-LAGANN to DVD with no English dub cause after hearing those few clips on youtube I felt like throwing up.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Feb 20, 2009 5:04 pm Whoops. Nitpickiness in this case is good. Thanks. ^^;
